label: Style category
description: A named group of ThingDef–ThingStyleDef pairings representing a coherent visual theme (e.g., Hindu, Horaxian) used by the ideology system.

thingDefStyles.label: Thing def styles
thingDefStyles.description: List of ThingDef–ThingStyleDef pairings that form this style category's visual theme. The central field; present in every shipped StyleCategoryDef.

iconPath.label: Icon path
iconPath.description: Texture path for the category icon shown in the ideology style picker.

fixedIdeoOnly.label: Fixed ideo only
fixedIdeoOnly.description: If true, this style category is only available to fixed (non-randomized) ideologies. The Horaxian category sets this to true.

addDesignators.label: Add designators
addDesignators.description: BuildableDefs added to the architect menu when a colony's ideology uses this style category.

addDesignatorGroups.label: Add designator groups
addDesignatorGroups.description: DesignatorDropdownGroupDefs added alongside addDesignators when this style category is active.

soundOngoingRitual.label: Sound ongoing ritual
soundOngoingRitual.description: Ambient SoundDef played during rituals that use this style. Set in every shipped ideology style category.

ritualVisualEffectDef.label: Ritual visual effect def
ritualVisualEffectDef.description: RitualVisualEffectDef played during rituals that use this style. Set in every shipped ideology style category.

basic-category.label: Basic category
basic-category.description: A style category with a thingDefStyles list, icon, and ritual sound and visual effect.
